subject: English
chapter: The Ghat of the Only World

remember: Students will be able to recall the key events, themes, and characters in the story 'The Ghat of the Only World'.
Students will be able to identify and describe the main elements of the narrative.
understand: Students will be able to explain the significance of the setting in 'The Ghat of the Only World' and its impact on the plot.
Students will be able to analyze the role of the protagonist in the story and their emotional journey.
apply: Students will be able to apply literary devices such as imagery, symbolism, and foreshadowing to understand the story.
Students will be able to use textual evidence to support their analysis of the story's themes and motifs.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the author's use of language and tone to convey the themes and emotions in 'The Ghat of the Only World'.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the story with other literary works to identify similarities and differences.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the plot and character development in 'The Ghat of the Only World'.
To analyze the themes and motifs in the story and their significance in the context of Indian society.
board_exam_objectives: To identify and describe the key literary devices used in the story.
To analyze the author's portrayal of social issues and their impact on the protagonist.
To evaluate the effectiveness of the author's use of language and narrative structure in conveying the themes and emotions in the story.
